scope: source-grounded input repair followed by a clean H-050 plan, commission, and Chapters 1-3 rerun
last_accepted_product: production-books/quit-sugar/chapters/chapter-01.md from run-002 and chapter-02.md from run-004

observed_conflict: lived-experience.md says S-021 combines a strong relief metaphor with 15 plus years of maintenance and daily actions to keep cravings at bay
framing.md says relief is paired with more than fifteen years of daily management, boundaries, and resets
S-021 separates a 15-plus-year weight-maintenance report from separately described daily craving-management actions and does not assign that duration to the actions

editor.route: fresh native Codex subscription context; never OpenRouter
editor.inputs: the complete two baseline files plus the complete S-021 packet and this repair commission
editor.output: complete minimally corrected candidates for both files
editor.scope: repair only the packet-to-synthesis authority conflict while preserving all other source mappings, claims, limits, structure, and prose

reviewer.route: separate fresh native Codex subscription context; never OpenRouter
reviewer.inputs: both complete corrected candidates, the complete S-021 packet, the repair commission, and the committed baseline needed to verify minimality
reviewer.checks: source fidelity, exact conflict removal, preservation of every unrelated source and claim, and absence of new inference
reviewer.action: accept or reject the complete two-file correction; never repair it

input_repair_precondition.acceptance_rule: commit repaired production inputs only after one editor proposal and one independent fresh full-file review both establish a minimal source-grounded correction with no other source or claim change
input_repair_precondition.forbidden: web search, new retrieval, research expansion, manual line edit, partial-file review, plan generation before repair acceptance, or treating repair acceptance as H-050 support

input_repair_r1.causal_classification: transport invalidity, not source-quality failure and not H-050 evidence
input_repair_r1.route: fresh native Codex subscription context; never OpenRouter
input_repair_r1.interpretation: the proposed edits appear semantically plausible but cannot be accepted, normalized, reviewed as candidates, or applied because the transport artifact is mechanically invalid
input_repair_r1.assembled_stdin_reconstructability: reconstructable from the immutable baseline files, S-021 packet, repair commission, raw response, and recorded native invocation

input_repair_r2_commission.route: fresh native Codex gpt-5.6-luna at max; never OpenRouter
input_repair_r2_commission.inputs: the same complete baseline lived synthesis, framing, S-021 packet, and repair scope
input_repair_r2_commission.output: a fresh complete two-file correction proposal that is mechanically valid without operator normalization
input_repair_r2_commission.forbidden: reuse or normalization of R1, manual repair, silent newline insertion, partial application, or semantic credit for R1
input_repair_r2_commission.next_gate: separate fresh Luna-max full-file reviewer after mechanical validity is established
input_repair_r2_commission.observability_requirement: persist the exact assembled input bundle prospectively before launch
input_repair_r2_commission.observability_classification: recording correction only; not a quality lever, prompt change, or new pipeline gate

input_repair_r2.causal_classification: mechanically valid candidate transport only; no semantic, source-quality, product, or H-050 inference
input_repair_r2.route: fresh native Codex subscription context; never OpenRouter

execution.nonblocking_diagnostic: the first git-status command returned 128 because the intentionally isolated workspace was not a Git repository; the editor then inspected and edited the five local files directly

input_repair_r2.candidate_substance: the two candidates separate the packet-supported report of keeping weight off, more or less, for 15-plus years from the separately described and undated daily management actions
input_repair_r2.next_gate: a separate fresh Luna-max full-file semantic review of both complete R2 candidates against both complete baselines, S-021, the repair commission, and the no-new-inference/minimality scope

start_direction_audit.interpretation: course confirmed: preserve invalid R1, obtain a mechanically valid independently reviewed R2, then continue to fresh end-to-end product generation without a new quality lever
start_direction_audit.causal_boundary: no product artifact, H-050 result, source-quality verdict, or downstream acceptance follows from GO

clean_rerun_law.invalidated: every run-013 plan, review, commission, and candidate handoff
clean_rerun_law.sequence_after_repair_commit: fresh complete plan and independent review; fresh complete C-01-C-03 commissions and whole-set audit; fresh complete C-01-C-03 first-draft batch before revision or product inference
clean_rerun_law.writer: anthropic/claude-opus-4.6 through OpenRouter with reasoning disabled
clean_rerun_law.judges: frozen native gpt-5.6-sol ultra Stage-A v2.3 instrument
clean_rerun_law.blindness: production roles see no reference or judge output

h050_causal_decision_rule.supported: blinded post-output audit confirms instantiation, all three first drafts are materially grounded-clean, and efficacy receives at most one reference verdict with role score at least 0.35
h050_causal_decision_rule.refuted: the same confirmed and grounded-clean conditions hold, but efficacy has at least three reference verdicts or role score below 0.35
h050_causal_decision_rule.inconclusive: any material grounded defect, unaccepted or ambiguous instantiation/handoff, invalid panel, or corpus inability prevents causal attribution
h050_causal_decision_rule.product_boundary: craft, length, objective, safety, and every other Stage-A gate remain unchanged promotion requirements

route_law: OpenRouter only for Opus 4.6 chapter writing and DeepSeek research; GPT/OpenAI, Luna, Sol, Gemini, Grok, planning, reviewing, auditing, and judging never use OpenRouter
quality_policy: optimize only for method integrity and quality; no speed, cost, token, or reasoning cap
next_artifact: separate fresh Luna-max full-file semantic review of both complete R2 candidates against both complete baselines, S-021, the repair commission, and the no-new-inference/minimality scope
notes: Run-013 remains immutable. No new permanent gate or hypothesis is introduced for this one input conflict.
